_comment: Example config for em-backup.mjs. Copy to ~/.config/em-backup/config.json (or set $EM_BACKUP_CONFIG to a path) and edit. The script will refuse --init/--sync without a valid config.
_backup_dir_comment: Where the local clone of the backup repo lives. Defaults to ~/.local/share/episodic-memory-backup if omitted. Tilde expansion supported.
_sources_comment: List of source dirs to mirror. Each gets rsynced into <backup_dir>/<dest> with redaction applied to text files; binaries are skipped (manifested in .skipped-files.json). At minimum back up your global ~/.episodic-memory/.
_allowlist_comment: Optional. Add per-config allowlist for emails/domains that should NOT be redacted (e.g. your team's published vendor addresses). Vendor commit-author constants for Claude/Codex/Cursor/Windsurf/Continue/Copilot, GitHub no-reply, RFC 2606 reserved domains, juan.delacruz@acme.com sample, and git@github.com SSH protocol address are already allowlisted by default.
